name: Triple Treat Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine the crumbs, sugar, butter, and nutmeg in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Press the mixture into a 9x13-inch pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes; remove from the oven.
5. Mix chocolate chips with coconut and walnuts.
6. Spread over the first layer.
7. Thinly mix marshmallow creme with milk and vanilla.
8. Drizzle over the top of the mixture.
9. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.
This recipe makes about 32 squares.
